title: rubus stenopetalus
intro: Rubus stenopetalus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry, is a species of thorny shrub in the rose family that is native to the Himalayan region. The medicinal properties of Rubus stenopetalus include its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties, which have been traditionally used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of this plant include its ability to support digestive health, reduce blood sugar levels, and act as an anti-cancer agent. Herbal preparations of Rubus stenopetalus include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other medicinal products.
